title: solanum glandulosum var. stellatopubescens
intro: Solanum glandulosum var. stellatopubescens, also known as the hairy-stemmed bitter apple or Solanum glandulosum variety, is a plant species within the nightshade family, characterized by its hairy stems and purple flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Solanum glandulosum var. stellatopubescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, wounds, and skin irritations.
